fa-mug-hot.appearanceId: a wide cylindrical mug with a handle on the right side and two or three wavy steam lines rising from the open top; coffee cup outline with rising steam curls
fa-mug-hot.functionalityId: represents a hot beverage such as coffee or tea; indicates a warm drink or break time in a food or lifestyle interface
fa-mug-hot.intentId: find or order a hot beverage; indicate a coffee break or warm drink option in an application

fa-mug-tea.appearanceId: a cylindrical mug with a handle on the right side and a small tea bag string dangling over the rim with a tag; teacup outline with a hanging tea bag and label
fa-mug-tea.functionalityId: represents a cup of tea or a tea-brewing action; indicates a tea drink or herbal beverage option
fa-mug-tea.intentId: select or order a tea beverage; indicate a tea-related feature or drink menu item

fa-mug-tea-saucer.appearanceId: a cylindrical mug with a handle and a tea bag string hanging over the rim, resting on a flat oval saucer beneath; teacup-and-saucer set with a dangling tea bag tag
fa-mug-tea-saucer.functionalityId: represents a formal tea service or a tea drink presented on a saucer; indicates an elevated tea experience or café-style beverage
fa-mug-tea-saucer.intentId: select a formal tea service or café beverage; indicate a refined tea drink option in a menu or lifestyle interface

fa-mug-marshmallows.appearanceId: a wide cylindrical mug with a handle and several small rounded marshmallow shapes floating on top inside the cup opening; hot cocoa mug outline with marshmallow pieces in the bowl
fa-mug-marshmallows.functionalityId: represents a hot chocolate or cocoa drink with marshmallows; indicates a sweet warm beverage or winter comfort drink
fa-mug-marshmallows.intentId: select or represent a hot chocolate drink; indicate a cozy winter beverage or sweet hot drink option

fa-mushroom.appearanceId: a rounded dome-shaped mushroom cap on a short stubby cylindrical stem; toadstool silhouette with a smooth convex cap and broad base
fa-mushroom.functionalityId: represents a mushroom ingredient or fungus in a food or nature context; indicates a foraging, cooking, or nature category
fa-mushroom.intentId: browse mushroom-related recipes or ingredients; represent a fungus or nature item in a food or outdoor application

fa-music.appearanceId: two eighth notes joined by a horizontal beam at the top with downward stems and filled note heads; beamed double music note pair
fa-music.functionalityId: represents audio playback or music content; opens or indicates a music player or audio feature
fa-music.intentId: access or play music or audio content; navigate to a music library or audio playback interface

fa-music-alt.appearanceId: a single quarter note with a filled oval head and a vertical stem topped by a small flag; standalone single eighth-note or flagged quarter-note glyph
fa-music-alt.functionalityId: represents music or audio content using an alternative note style; indicates an audio or music feature with a single-note symbol
fa-music-alt.intentId: access music or audio content with an alternate visual representation; navigate to a sound or music interface

fa-music-alt-slash.appearanceId: a single flagged musical note glyph with a diagonal slash line drawn through it; alternative single note silhouette with a strikethrough overlay
fa-music-alt-slash.functionalityId: mutes or disables music or audio playback; indicates that sound or music is turned off
fa-music-alt-slash.intentId: mute or disable music playback; indicate that audio content is currently silenced or unavailable

fa-music-magnifying-glass.appearanceId: two beamed eighth notes with a magnifying glass overlaid in the lower-right corner; double music note pair with a circular search lens badge
fa-music-magnifying-glass.functionalityId: searches for a song, artist, or audio track; finds music content within a library or streaming service
fa-music-magnifying-glass.intentId: search for music or a specific audio track; locate a song or artist in a music library

fa-music-slash.appearanceId: two beamed eighth notes joined by a horizontal beam with a diagonal slash line drawn through the pair; double music note silhouette with a forward-slash strikethrough
fa-music-slash.functionalityId: mutes or disables music or audio playback; indicates that sound output is turned off or unavailable
fa-music-slash.intentId: mute or disable music playback; indicate that audio is silenced or the music feature is inactive

fa-mustache.appearanceId: a symmetrical curved mustache shape with two upward-curling ends meeting at a center dip; handlebar mustache silhouette with twin outward curls
fa-mustache.functionalityId: represents a mustache as a style or disguise element; indicates a facial hair option in an avatar or costume interface
fa-mustache.intentId: add or select a mustache in an avatar customization or costume tool; represent a facial hair style or disguise element

fa-n.appearanceId: a single uppercase letter N glyph in a standard serif or sans-serif typeface; plain capital letter N character
fa-n.functionalityId: represents the letter N as an alphabetical index, label, or keyboard shortcut indicator; displays the fourteenth letter of the Latin alphabet
fa-n.intentId: use the letter N as a label, index marker, or alphabetical navigation element; identify an item beginning with or categorized under the letter N

fa-naira-sign.appearanceId: an uppercase letter N glyph with two short horizontal double bars crossing through the upper portion of the vertical strokes; Nigerian naira currency symbol with dual crossbars
fa-naira-sign.functionalityId: represents the Nigerian naira currency in financial interfaces; displays or inputs a naira monetary value
fa-naira-sign.intentId: indicate a price or amount in Nigerian naira; access or display naira currency information in a financial application

fa-narwhal.appearanceId: a cetacean body silhouette with a long straight spiral tusk projecting forward from the snout, a rounded head, and small flippers; whale outline with a prominent unicorn-style horn
fa-narwhal.functionalityId: represents a narwhal animal in a wildlife, marine, or fantasy context; indicates an Arctic sea creature or unique animal category
fa-narwhal.intentId: represent a narwhal or Arctic marine animal; use as a whimsical or wildlife icon in a nature or education interface

fa-nesting-dolls.appearanceId: two or three stacked matryoshka doll silhouettes of decreasing size nested together, each with a rounded top and cylindrical base; Russian nesting doll set outline with concentric doll shapes
fa-nesting-dolls.functionalityId: represents nested or layered structures, Russian folk art, or a nesting-dolls toy; indicates hierarchical or contained relationships in a data or UI context
fa-nesting-dolls.intentId: visualize a nested or hierarchical data structure; represent Russian folk culture or a layered containment concept

fa-network-wired.appearanceId: a hierarchical diagram of small rectangles connected by vertical and horizontal lines, resembling a tree-structured LAN topology; wired network diagram with branching node boxes
fa-network-wired.functionalityId: represents a wired network topology or LAN infrastructure; displays or manages physical network connections and devices
fa-network-wired.intentId: view or configure a wired network setup; manage physical network infrastructure or LAN topology

fa-neuter.appearanceId: a circle outline with a single short vertical line extending downward from the bottom, lacking a crossbar or arrow; neuter or sexless gender symbol with a plain downward stem
fa-neuter.functionalityId: represents the neuter or ungendered symbol in biological or demographic contexts; indicates a non-binary or unspecified gender category
fa-neuter.intentId: select or indicate a neuter or ungendered classification; represent a neutral gender option in a form or demographic interface

fa-newspaper.appearanceId: a folded rectangular sheet with a bold headline text block at the top and several columns of smaller text lines below, with a fold crease on one side; broadsheet newspaper outline with headline and column text
fa-newspaper.functionalityId: represents a news article, publication, or press content; accesses or displays news feed or media content
fa-newspaper.intentId: read or browse news articles and publications; access a news feed or media content section

fa-nfc.appearanceId: three progressively larger concentric curved arcs radiating outward to the right, resembling a wireless signal; NFC wave symbol with three nested curved lines
fa-nfc.functionalityId: represents Near Field Communication capability or NFC tap-to-connect functionality; indicates an NFC-enabled device or transaction point
fa-nfc.intentId: use NFC to connect or transfer data by tapping devices; access or configure an NFC payment or communication feature

fa-nfc-lock.appearanceId: three concentric curved NFC arcs with a small padlock shape overlaid in the lower-right corner; NFC wave symbol with a locked padlock badge
fa-nfc-lock.functionalityId: represents a locked or secured NFC connection; indicates that NFC access is restricted or requires authentication
fa-nfc-lock.intentId: secure an NFC channel or restrict NFC access; indicate that an NFC transaction requires authorization

fa-nfc-magnifying-glass.appearanceId: three concentric curved NFC arcs with a magnifying glass shape overlaid in the lower-right corner; NFC wave symbol with a circular search lens badge
fa-nfc-magnifying-glass.functionalityId: searches for or scans an NFC tag or device; inspects NFC data or discovers nearby NFC-enabled items
fa-nfc-magnifying-glass.intentId: scan or search for an NFC tag or device; discover or inspect nearby NFC content

fa-nfc-pen.appearanceId: three concentric curved NFC arcs with a diagonal pen or pencil shape overlaid in the lower-right corner; NFC wave symbol with a writing instrument badge
fa-nfc-pen.functionalityId: writes data to an NFC tag or edits NFC content; programs or configures an NFC chip via a write action
fa-nfc-pen.intentId: write or program data to an NFC tag; configure or update NFC chip content

fa-nfc-signal.appearanceId: three concentric curved NFC arcs with one or two additional smaller signal arcs or dots indicating active transmission; NFC wave symbol with an extra active-signal indicator
fa-nfc-signal.functionalityId: indicates an active or transmitting NFC signal; shows that NFC communication is currently in progress
fa-nfc-signal.intentId: confirm that an NFC signal is actively transmitting; monitor or display the live status of an NFC connection

fa-nfc-slash.appearanceId: three concentric curved NFC arcs with a diagonal slash line drawn through them; NFC wave symbol with a forward-slash strikethrough overlay
fa-nfc-slash.functionalityId: disables or indicates unavailable NFC functionality; shows that NFC is turned off or blocked
fa-nfc-slash.intentId: disable or turn off NFC on a device; indicate that NFC is inactive or unsupported

fa-nfc-trash.appearanceId: three concentric curved NFC arcs with a small trash can or waste bin shape overlaid in the lower-right corner; NFC wave symbol with a delete or discard badge
fa-nfc-trash.functionalityId: deletes or clears NFC tag data; removes a stored NFC record or wipes an NFC chip
fa-nfc-trash.intentId: delete or wipe data from an NFC tag; clear or remove an NFC record from a device

fa-nose.appearanceId: a curved triangular or rounded nose bridge shape with two small oval nostrils at the base; human nose profile outline with visible nostril openings
fa-nose.functionalityId: represents a nose in an anatomy, emoji, or avatar customization context; indicates olfactory or scent-related features
fa-nose.intentId: customize or select a nose shape in an avatar editor; represent olfactory senses or a facial anatomy element

fa-not-equal.appearanceId: two short horizontal parallel lines with a diagonal slash crossing through both; not-equal-to mathematical operator with a strikethrough pair of bars
fa-not-equal.functionalityId: represents a not-equal comparison operator in a mathematical or logical expression; filters or queries items where values differ
fa-not-equal.intentId: apply a not-equal filter or comparison in a data query; indicate that two values are different in a formula or logical expression

fa-notdef.appearanceId: a rectangular box outline containing a question mark or a small inner rectangle, representing an undefined or missing glyph placeholder; empty glyph box with a fallback indicator
fa-notdef.functionalityId: represents a missing or undefined character glyph in a font; indicates that a character has no corresponding visual representation
fa-notdef.intentId: identify or handle a missing glyph in a font rendering context; indicate an undefined or unsupported character

fa-note.appearanceId: a small rectangular paper sheet with a folded corner in the upper-right and a plain body; simple note paper outline with a dog-ear corner fold
fa-note.functionalityId: creates or represents a single text note or memo; displays a plain note item in a notes or annotation interface
fa-note.intentId: create or view a simple note or memo; annotate content with a plain text note

fa-note-medical.appearanceId: a small rectangular paper sheet with a folded corner and a medical cross or plus sign badge overlaid on the body; note paper outline with a healthcare cross symbol
fa-note-medical.functionalityId: represents a medical record, clinical note, or health documentation entry; creates or accesses a patient or health-related note
fa-note-medical.intentId: create or access a medical note or clinical record; document health information in a medical or patient care interface

fa-note-sticky.appearanceId: a small square paper sheet with a slightly curled or folded lower-right corner suggesting a peel-off adhesive note; sticky note square with a curled corner detail
fa-note-sticky.functionalityId: creates or represents a sticky note or quick memo reminder; adds an adhesive annotation to a document or interface
fa-note-sticky.intentId: add a sticky note reminder or quick annotation; place a brief memo on a document or workspace

fa-notebook.appearanceId: a rectangular notebook with a spiral wire binding along the left edge, a solid cover, and ruled or blank interior pages; spiral-bound notebook outline with a coiled spine
fa-notebook.functionalityId: represents a notebook or journal for writing notes and records; opens or indicates a note-taking or journal application
fa-notebook.intentId: open or manage a notebook or journal for note-taking; access a personal writing or record-keeping interface

fa-notes.appearanceId: two small rectangular paper sheets with folded corners slightly overlapping or stacked, suggesting multiple notes; dual-note paper stack with dog-ear corners
fa-notes.functionalityId: represents a collection of multiple notes or memos; opens or manages a list of text notes in a notes application
fa-notes.intentId: view or manage a collection of notes or memos; access a multi-note list or note-taking library

fa-notes-medical.appearanceId: a rectangular clipboard or notepad with a medical cross badge and several horizontal ruled lines on the body; clinical notepad outline with a healthcare cross symbol and text lines
fa-notes-medical.functionalityId: represents medical notes, clinical documentation, or a patient chart; accesses or creates health records and medical paperwork
fa-notes-medical.intentId: access or create medical documentation or a patient chart; manage clinical notes in a healthcare application

fa-o.appearanceId: a single uppercase letter O glyph in a standard serif or sans-serif typeface; plain capital letter O character
fa-o.functionalityId: represents the letter O as an alphabetical index, label, or keyboard shortcut indicator; displays the fifteenth letter of the Latin alphabet
fa-o.intentId: use the letter O as a label, index marker, or alphabetical navigation element; identify an item beginning with or categorized under the letter O

fa-object-exclude.appearanceId: two overlapping shapes—such as a circle and a rectangle—where the overlapping intersection area is removed, leaving only the non-overlapping outer portions; boolean-exclude result showing two shapes minus their shared overlap
fa-object-exclude.functionalityId: performs a boolean exclude operation removing the intersection of two shapes; subtracts the overlapping region from both objects
fa-object-exclude.intentId: apply a boolean exclude to remove the overlap between two graphic shapes; create a cutout effect by excluding the shared area

fa-object-group.appearanceId: two or more small rectangles enclosed within a larger dashed or solid bounding rectangle, indicating they are grouped together; selection group outline containing multiple inner shapes
fa-object-group.functionalityId: groups multiple selected objects into a single unit; combines separate elements into one grouped layer or component
fa-object-group.intentId: group multiple design elements into a single object; combine selected shapes or layers for collective editing

fa-object-intersect.appearanceId: two overlapping shapes where only the shared intersection area in the center is highlighted or filled, with the outer portions faded; boolean-intersect result showing the overlap region of two objects
fa-object-intersect.functionalityId: performs a boolean intersect operation retaining only the overlapping area of two shapes; extracts the shared region from two overlapping objects
fa-object-intersect.intentId: apply a boolean intersect to keep only the overlapping area of two shapes; extract the common region from multiple graphic objects

fa-object-subtract.appearanceId: two overlapping shapes where the foreground shape is subtracted from the background shape, leaving a cutout hole in the back object; boolean-subtract result showing a shape with a punched-out foreground cutout
fa-object-subtract.functionalityId: performs a boolean subtract operation removing the front shape from the back shape; punches a hole in one object using the outline of another
fa-object-subtract.intentId: apply a boolean subtract to cut a shape out of another object; create a cutout in a background shape using a foreground mask

fa-object-ungroup.appearanceId: two or more small rectangles with the outer bounding group rectangle broken or dashed with gaps, indicating the group has been dissolved; ungrouped selection outline with a broken or open bounding box
fa-object-ungroup.functionalityId: ungroups a combined object back into its individual separate components; dissolves a grouped layer into independently editable elements
fa-object-ungroup.intentId: ungroup a grouped design object into its individual parts; separate a combined element into independently editable shapes

fa-object-union.appearanceId: two overlapping shapes merged into a single unified outline with the overlapping boundary removed, forming one combined silhouette; boolean-union result showing two shapes fused into a single merged form
fa-object-union.functionalityId: performs a boolean union operation merging two or more shapes into one outline; combines overlapping objects into a single unified path
fa-object-union.intentId: apply a boolean union to merge multiple shapes into one; combine overlapping graphic objects into a single unified shape

fa-objects-align-bottom.appearanceId: two or three small rectangles of different heights sitting flush along a common baseline at the bottom edge; shapes with their bottom edges aligned to a horizontal guide
fa-objects-align-bottom.functionalityId: aligns selected objects to the bottom edge; snaps the lower edges of multiple elements to a common horizontal baseline
fa-objects-align-bottom.intentId: align multiple design elements to the bottom edge; ensure objects share a common lower boundary in a layout

fa-objects-align-center-horizontal.appearanceId: two or three small rectangles of different sizes centered along a shared horizontal midline running left to right; shapes aligned to a common horizontal center axis
fa-objects-align-center-horizontal.functionalityId: aligns selected objects to the horizontal center axis; centers multiple elements vertically along a shared horizontal midpoint
fa-objects-align-center-horizontal.intentId: center multiple design elements along a horizontal axis; align objects to the same vertical midpoint in a layout

fa-objects-align-center-vertical.appearanceId: two or three small rectangles of different widths centered along a shared vertical midline running top to bottom; shapes aligned to a common vertical center axis
fa-objects-align-center-vertical.functionalityId: aligns selected objects to the vertical center axis; centers multiple elements horizontally along a shared vertical midpoint
fa-objects-align-center-vertical.intentId: center multiple design elements along a vertical axis; align objects to the same horizontal midpoint in a layout

fa-objects-align-left.appearanceId: two or three small rectangles of different widths flush against a common left edge vertical guide; shapes with their left edges aligned to a vertical guide line
fa-objects-align-left.functionalityId: aligns selected objects to the left edge; snaps the left sides of multiple elements to a common vertical guide
fa-objects-align-left.intentId: align multiple design elements to the left edge; ensure objects share a common left boundary in a layout

fa-objects-align-right.appearanceId: two or three small rectangles of different widths flush against a common right edge vertical guide; shapes with their right edges aligned to a vertical guide line
fa-objects-align-right.functionalityId: aligns selected objects to the right edge; snaps the right sides of multiple elements to a common vertical guide
fa-objects-align-right.intentId: align multiple design elements to the right edge; ensure objects share a common right boundary in a layout

fa-objects-align-top.appearanceId: two or three small rectangles of different heights with their top edges flush along a common top horizontal guide; shapes with their upper edges aligned to a horizontal guide line
fa-objects-align-top.functionalityId: aligns selected objects to the top edge; snaps the upper edges of multiple elements to a common horizontal guide
fa-objects-align-top.intentId: align multiple design elements to the top edge; ensure objects share a common upper boundary in a layout

fa-objects-column.appearanceId: two or three small rectangles stacked vertically in a single column with equal spacing between them; shapes arranged in a vertical column layout
fa-objects-column.functionalityId: arranges selected objects into a vertical column; distributes elements evenly in a single vertical stack
fa-objects-column.intentId: arrange design elements into a vertical column layout; distribute objects evenly in a stacked vertical arrangement
